title: SessionListItem
description: Lightweight summary returned by scanProjects(). Designed for list views; does not include the full messages array.

id.description: UUID of the session. Matches the JSONL filename without extension.

sanitizedProjectPath.description: Sanitized project directory name (matches the on-disk folder under ~/.claude/projects/).

projectPath.description: Best-effort desanitized absolute project path. Null when desanitization is ambiguous.

title.description: Session title (customTitle > goal > ai > firstUser; 'Untitled Session' fallback).

createdAt.description: First timestamp found in the transcript, falling back to file birthtime.

messageCount.description: Number of user/assistant/system messages in the transcript.

firstUserMessage.description: First non-meta user message text, truncated to 80 chars.

gitRoot.description: Git root of the working directory; only populated when findGitRoot was supplied.

worktreeSession.description: Worktree metadata if the session ran inside an isolated worktree.

permissionMode.description: Effective permission mode for the session.

workDirExists.description: True when the session's working directory still exists on disk.
